title: Asset Manifest
description: Inventory of generated/sourced assets produced by the Asset Generator.

path.description: Relative path within the pipeline project directory

generation_summary.description: Brief summary of how the asset was generated or sourced

original_url.description: Source URL if downloaded from a stock service

style_mode.description: Render mode locked at proposal. Carried into asset_manifest so downstream stages can branch on it without re-reading production_proposal.

pipeline.description: Pipeline that produced this asset_manifest (e.g. 'ad-video'). Optional informational field.

project_id.description: Project workspace id under projects/. Optional informational field.

narration_files.description: Per-section TTS file inventory (ad-video). Each entry: section_id (matches script.sections[].id), file (path), duration_seconds.

subtitle_file.description: Path to the generated subtitle file. Conventionally .ass for ad-video (libass needs PlayRes header for predictable sizing).

music_file.description: Path to the generated/selected music track.

narration_durations.description: Map of section_id → seconds. Mirrors the section-level data in narration_files for quick lookup.

visual_assets.description: Optional ad-video supplement to assets[] for richer visual-asset metadata. Free-form items.

sample_clip.description: Path to the 10–15s sample preview clip generated before full asset generation begins.

total_narration_seconds.description: Sum of narration_files[].duration_seconds. Should ≈ script.total_duration_seconds within ±5%.

costs.description: Per-tool cost log accumulated during asset generation. Sum equals total_cost_usd.
